<!-- Provide a clear, concise summary of the changes in this PR. -->

---

## 🔄 Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix — resolves a broken link, incorrect data, or logic error
- [ ] ✨ New feature — adds a new resource, section, or functionality
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update — improves or adds documentation
- [ ] 🌐 Localization — adds or updates translated content
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring — restructures without changing functionality
- [ ] 🧹 Chore — maintenance task (e.g., fixing typos, updating metadata)

---

<!-- What was the situation before? -->

<!-- What is the situation now? -->

## ✅ Checklist

### General
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I have checked for duplicate issues/PRs
- [ ] My branch name follows the naming convention (e.g., `feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`)
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format

### Content Changes
- [ ] All links in modified files are working and verified
- [ ] New resources have been added to `resources/index.md`
- [ ] Resource entries follow the required table format
- [ ] Source and licensing of any new resource is documented

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct and renders properly

### Localization (if applicable)
- [ ] File is named using ISO 639-1 language codes (e.g., `-sw` for Swahili)
- [ ] Localization tracker in `resources/index.md` has been updated

---

## 🧪 Testing / Verification

<!-- How did you verify your changes work correctly? -->
- [ ] I manually tested all changed links
- [ ] I previewed all Markdown files for formatting errors
- [ ] I reviewed the diff and confirmed no unintended changes

---
